OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector, e.g. 'flashpoint'.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

DOPPEL_ORGANIZATION_CODE.description: Identifies the specific organizational workspace for multi-tenant keys

DOPPEL_TLP_LEVEL.description: Default TLP level of the imported entities.

DOPPEL_ALERTS_ENDPOINT.description: Specifies the API resource path for alert ingestion

DOPPEL_HISTORICAL_POLLING_DAYS.description: Determines the time-window for initial data fetching

DOPPEL_MAX_RETRIES.description: Configures automated error recovery from transient failures

DOPPEL_RETRY_DELAY.description: Controls the frequency of requests during error recovery

DOPPEL_PAGE_SIZE.description: Optimizes request volume and memory usage per fetch
